creator: igorz@yandex.ru
text:
> 1) Can you explain what you mean by 'configure php manually'

Easy workaround: install apache22 (prefork). make & install php5, deinstall apache, install apache-itk.

> 2) which port needs fixing www/apache* or a php one ?

php

> 3) If you have a stack trace from the core dump (via gdb) can you provide that 
> too.

Sorry, don't have.
